581 SCTNG_ADMSN_CD SCTNG_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Suctioning (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving suctioning therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
